# Blocker: new Python helper added to shipped skill directory

## Design

Adds a new helper to a shipped skill.

## Contracts

| Path | Why |
|---|---|
| .claude/skills/new-skill/helper.py | NEW Python helper — should be BLOCKER |
| .claude/skills/new-skill/SKILL.md | OK |
| .claude/skills/new-skill/runner.mjs | OK (JS helper) |
